meaning: n.底部,基础,根据地,基地,本部,基数,(运动)出发点vt.以...作基础,基于... adj.卑鄙的,低级的
examples: He's gone AWOL from his base.
He didn't make it past first base.
You should bear in mind that I have no military or training link with the base.
Professor BETH HILMAN (Rutgers University): I mean it could close down the base effectively.
